title: fence-agents bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 8.
description:
[4.2.1-129.16]
- fence_nutanix_ahv: new fence agent
  Resolves: RHEL-110964

[4.2.1-129.15]
- fence_kubevirt: use hard poweroff
  Resolves: RHEL-96179

[4.2.1-129.14]
- fence_aws: add skip_os_shutdown parameter
  Resolves: RHEL-109814

[4.2.1-129.13]
- bundled requests: fix CVE-2024-47081
  Resolves: RHEL-104741

[4.2.1-129.12]
- fence_ibm_vpc: add apikey file support
  Resolves: RHEL-107506

[4.2.1-129.11]
- fence_aliyun: add credentials file support
  Resolves: RHEL-99338

[4.2.1-129.8]
- fence_ibm_powervs: add private endpoint and token file support
  Resolves: RHEL-65025

[4.2.1-129.7]
- fence_azure_arm: use azure-identity instead of msrestazure, which has
  been deprecated
  Resolves: RHEL-76492

[4.2.1-129.5]
- fence_scsi: preempt clears all devices on the mpath device, so only
  run it for the first device
  Resolves: RHEL-56840

[4.2.1-129.4]
- bundled setuptools: fix CVE-2024-6345
  Resolves: RHEL-50223
full_text:
[4.2.1-129.16]
- fence_nutanix_ahv: new fence agent
  Resolves: RHEL-110964

[4.2.1-129.15]
- fence_kubevirt: use hard poweroff
  Resolves: RHEL-96179

[4.2.1-129.14]
- fence_aws: add skip_os_shutdown parameter
  Resolves: RHEL-109814

[4.2.1-129.13]
- bundled requests: fix CVE-2024-47081
  Resolves: RHEL-104741

[4.2.1-129.12]
- fence_ibm_vpc: add apikey file support
  Resolves: RHEL-107506

[4.2.1-129.11]
- fence_aliyun: add credentials file support
  Resolves: RHEL-99338

[4.2.1-129.8]
- fence_ibm_powervs: add private endpoint and token file support
  Resolves: RHEL-65025

[4.2.1-129.7]
- fence_azure_arm: use azure-identity instead of msrestazure, which has
  been deprecated
  Resolves: RHEL-76492

[4.2.1-129.5]
- fence_scsi: preempt clears all devices on the mpath device, so only
  run it for the first device
  Resolves: RHEL-56840

[4.2.1-129.4]
- bundled setuptools: fix CVE-2024-6345
  Resolves: RHEL-50223
